instructions: When editing code, treat all comments as immutable. If code changes make a comment inaccurate, stop and ask for guidance instead of modifying the comment.

Write JSDoc terse and on-point: a short summary line, a blank line, then `-` bullet points for details, then `@param` lines. One idea per bullet. Never use dense multi-clause prose sentences. Describe the current implementation only — never compare to a previous/old approach or narrate what changed.
